title: Cavaliers ladies through to SWD final
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Cavaliers ladies’ cricket team had two solid victories last weekend, qualifying them for the SWD finals against Pacaltsdorp in Oudtshoorn this Sunday.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Cavaliers ladies’ cricket team had two solid victories last weekend, qualifying them for the SWD finals against Pacaltsdorp in Oudtshoorn this Sunday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The match will start at 10:00.","html":"The match will start at 10:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Match 1:","html":"Match 1:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Cavaliers vs Thembalethu Hub (Mossel Bay)","html":"Cavaliers vs Thembalethu Hub (Mossel Bay)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In their first match in Mossel Bay, the Cavaliers took on Thembalethu Hub and opted to bowl first.","html":"In their first match in Mossel Bay, the Cavaliers took on Thembalethu Hub and opted to bowl first."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Their disciplined bowling attack restricted Thembalethu to a modest 77/8 in 20 overs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Shanon Nicol led the charge with an outstanding 2/7, supported by Kim Malgas (1/14) and Kemrodine Swartz (1/23), who kept the opposition under constant pressure.","html":"Shanon Nicol led the charge with an outstanding 2/7, supported by Kim Malgas (1/14) and Kemrodine Swartz (1/23), who kept the opposition under constant pressure."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Chasing 78 for victory, Kemrodine Swartz steered the ship with a composed 45 off 47 balls. They would eventually win the match without losing a single wicket.","html":"Chasing 78 for victory, Kemrodine Swartz steered the ship with a composed 45 off 47 balls. They would eventually win the match without losing a single wicket."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Match 2:","html":"Match 2:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Cavaliers vs Dysselsdorp Cricket Club","html":"Cavaliers vs Dysselsdorp Cricket Club"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Cavaliers carried their momentum into the second match against Dysselsdorp Cricket Club.","html":"The Cavaliers carried their momentum into the second match against Dysselsdorp Cricket Club."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Batting first, they posted an imposing 149/3 in their 20 overs, driven by a magnificent 70 from Kemrodine Swartz and a solid 43 from Kim Malgas.","html":"Batting first, they posted an imposing 149/3 in their 20 overs, driven by a magnificent 70 from Kemrodine Swartz and a solid 43 from Kim Malgas."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Cavaliers’ bowlers then delivered a masterclass, skittling Dysselsdorp for just 46 runs. Nicolette Sass-Jegels stole the show with a phenomenal spell of four overs, including two maidens, conceding only two runs while claiming five wickets.","html":"The Cavaliers’ bowlers then delivered a masterclass, skittling Dysselsdorp for just 46 runs. Nicolette Sass-Jegels stole the show with a phenomenal spell of four overs, including two maidens, conceding only two runs while claiming five wickets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Treidine Solomons (1/4 in 2 overs) and Kim Malgas (2/8 in 2 overs) also provided excellent support, ensuring an impressive victory.","html":"Treidine Solomons (1/4 in 2 overs) and Kim Malgas (2/8 in 2 overs) also provided excellent support, ensuring an impressive victory."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
